question: Based on the area chart of annual profit from 2018 to 2022, which statement about the profits is most accurate?

options.B: Profit in the last two years appears to be the same.
options.D: Profit in 2019 was lower than in 2018.

explanation: Bars for the highest years exceed the canvas and are clipped, making them look the same height; the true relationship cannot be inferred from the visual.
